name: amanar
description: Amanar agent-kit: one plugin-spec package of skills, hooks, and tools for Pi, Claude Code, and Codex — with a runner that gates completion on evidence.

scripts.test: node --test src/hooks/tests/*.test.ts src/essence/tests/*.test.ts src/config/tests/*.test.ts src/sync/tests/*.test.ts src/kernel/tests/*.test.ts src/loop/tests/*.test.ts src/knowledge/tests/*.test.ts pi/tests/*.test.ts src/eval/tests/*.test.ts src/eval/tests/*.test.mjs
